name: Baserun
description: Baserun — LLM testing and evaluation platform for tracking prompt performance, regressions, and model comparisons.

seo.title: Baserun — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Baserun: Baserun — LLM testing and evaluation platform for tracking prompt performance, regressions, and model comparisons.

when_to_use: Catching prompt regressions before deploying LLM updates
Tracking prompt performance metrics across model versions
Running automated eval suites for LLM output correctness
Comparing GPT-4 vs Claude vs Gemini on the same test set

pros: Trace and eval in one view
cons: Overlaps heavily with Braintrust and Langfuse
review.verdict: Decent if you need a lightweight eval harness; Braintrust or Langfuse have stronger ecosystems.
review.best_for: Small teams running structured prompt evals during LLM app development
review.not_for: Orgs already committed to Braintrust, Langfuse, or Helicone stacks
